title: Slack connection
description: Configure one Slack identity for Web API calls. Add an app-level token only when this connection should receive Slack triggers.

fields.name: auth_identity
fields.label: Identity
fields.description: Choose whether this connection acts as a Slack bot app or as a user token. A connection uses exactly one identity.

fields.name: identity_token
fields.label: Bot or user token
fields.description: Slack Web API token for the selected identity. Use xoxb- for bot connections or xoxp-/xoxc-style user tokens for personal connections.

fields.name: socket_app_token
fields.label: Socket Mode app token
fields.description: Optional Slack app-level xapp- token. When omitted, read/send tools still work but Slack triggers are unavailable.

fields.name: workspace_ref
fields.label: Workspace reference
fields.description: Stable local label for this Slack workspace. It is used in audit records and redacted tool output, not sent to Slack.

fields.name: max_thread_messages
fields.label: Max thread messages
fields.description: Maximum number of messages Otto may read from a single Slack thread.

fields.name: max_message_chars
fields.label: Max message chars
fields.description: Maximum characters retained from each Slack message before tool output is bounded and redacted.

fields.name: max_body_chars
fields.label: Max send body chars
fields.description: Maximum characters Otto may send after approval.

fields.name: attribution_enabled
fields.label: Append attribution footer
fields.description: When on, outgoing Slack messages (sends and thread replies) carry a transparency footer naming the human approver. This is a trust/transparency label only — it does not change draft-by-default or approval gating.

fields.name: attribution_name
fields.label: Approver name
fields.description: Name shown in the attribution footer (substituted for {Name}). Leave blank to use a generic label.

fields.name: attribution_template
fields.label: Attribution template
fields.default: — Reviewed & approved to send via Otto
fields.description: Footer template appended to outgoing messages. Works as-is; optionally add {Name} where the approver name should appear (set Approver name above). Preview the rendered footer below.

fixture.attribution_template: — Reviewed & approved to send via Otto
